profile_backing.route_profile_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-post-p151-reprofile cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(eig_48x48_f64|eigh_48x48_f64|cholesky_1024x1024_f64|qr_1024x1024_f64|pinv_192x192_f64|lu_1024x1024_f64|svd_48x48_f64|svd_48x48_full_f64|matmul_2d_1024x1024x1024_f64)' --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

focused_baseline.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1149989 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1149989 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-p1vbf31-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(lu_1024x1024_f64|cholesky_1024x1024_f64|matmul_2d_1024x1024x1024_f64)' --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

candidate.lever: fused in-place LU trailing Schur update
candidate.description: Replaced the existing L21 copy, U12 copy, matmul_2d product, and product subtract pass with an LU-local row-chunked Schur update. The candidate updated disjoint trailing rows in place, used 4-lane portable SIMD across columns, and accumulated every output element over panel columns t=0..jb in ascending order before subtracting once.

proof_test.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1149989 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1149989 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-p1vbf31-proof cargo test -p fj-lax --lib lu -- --nocapture
proof_test.details: 58 tests passed in candidate state, including lu_blocked_path_reconstructs_and_matches_scalar and lu_real_fast_path_bit_identical_to_complex_zero_imag_path. A first compile attempt failed because the read-only split prefix was still typed as &mut [f64]; that borrow shape was fixed before the passing proof run.

rebench.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1149989 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1149989 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-p1vbf31-after cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(lu_1024x1024_f64|cholesky_1024x1024_f64|matmul_2d_1024x1024x1024_f64)' --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Candidate left pivot scan order, whole-row swaps, panel factorization, and U12 forward solve unchanged. The temporary fused Schur update accumulated each A22 cell over panel columns t=0..jb in ascending order, then performed one subtract into the same cell.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: Partial-pivot comparison used the same strict greater-than scan and row order; candidate could only perturb later trailing values through a numerically equivalent blocked update, matching the existing blocked-LU tolerance contract.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Candidate used separate multiplication and addition in the same per-cell t order; SIMD lanes were independent columns with no horizontal reduction, no mul_add call, no mixed precision, and no reassociation within a cell.
isomorphism_proof.rng: N/A: LU consumes no random state.
isomorphism_proof.errors: No public error path changed in candidate state; final production source was restored.

validation.command: RCH fixed-worker cargo test -p fj-lax --lib lu -- --nocapture
RCH fixed-worker Criterion target and guard benches
validation.result: candidate regressed LU1024 and was rejected

alien_source.applied_slice: Tried eliminating L21, U12, and product scratch materialization for LU's right-looking Schur update.
alien_source.outcome: Data-motion reduction alone lost to the existing packed/threaded GEMM microkernel at LU1024. Do not repeat direct fused Schur-loop variants without a fundamentally different kernel.

next_primitive.target: Reprofile restored source, then attack a different linalg primitive: blocked Cholesky full Schur update if cholesky_1024x1024_f64 remains top, or eig values-only Hessenberg reduction if eig re-emerges.
next_primitive.target_ratio: >=1.15x on the next fixed-worker top linalg row
next_primitive.reason: The fused LU loop preserved behavior but failed the Score>=2.0 gate. The next pass must shift primitive family instead of micro-tuning the same direct LU Schur update.
proof_obligations: ordering, tie-breaking, floating-point, and RNG isomorphism notes
restore and record rejection if same-worker Criterion does not clear Score>=2.0
